assertions.assertion: Program.cs sets TokenCleanupBatchSize = 500 on the operational store options
assertions.rationale: TokenCleanupBatchSize is a less commonly known option.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs sets ConsumedTokenCleanupDelay = 600 on the operational store options
assertions.rationale: ConsumedTokenCleanupDelay is Duende-specific and unlikely known without docs.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs sets FuzzTokenCleanupStart = true on the operational store options
assertions.rationale: FuzzTokenCleanupStart is a Duende-specific v7+ option.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs sets DefaultSchema to 'identity_ops' on the operational store options
assertions.rationale: DefaultSchema is standard EF Core option.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs sets TokenCleanupInterval = 900 and EnableTokenCleanup = true
assertions.rationale: EnableTokenCleanup and TokenCleanupInterval are well-known options.
